title: VVUQ candidate case
description: One candidate behavior presented to one of the 10 VVUQ gates: the gate slug, the structural verification inputs, the observed metrics, the independent reference metrics, the multi-run set for uncertainty, and whether a human review was recorded.

verification_inputs.description: structural and policy facts the gate verification predicates consume

observed.description: observed metric values for this candidate

reference.description: independent reference metric values (the validation truth)

runs.description: per-run metric dicts for uncertainty quantification

human_review.description: true when a recorded human reviewer has signed off
